tools.name: ping
tools.description: Echo request for connectivity checks.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Report server readiness and enforced safety limits.

tools.name: tool_catalogue
tools.description: Enumerate all available tools with their annotations.

tools.name: workspace_capability_snapshot
tools.description: Expose cached ClickUp capability probes for this session.

tools.name: workspace_list
tools.description: List accessible ClickUp workspaces (teams). Use when you need workspace IDs before exploring spaces.

tools.name: space_list_for_workspace
tools.description: List spaces for a workspace by workspaceId. Use search when you only know workspace names.

tools.name: folder_list_for_space
tools.description: List folders within a ClickUp space. Use when you already know spaceId.

tools.name: list_list_for_space_or_folder
tools.description: List lists inside a space or folder by ID. If you only know names, resolve them first with resolve_path_to_ids.

tools.name: workspace_overview
tools.description: Summarise workspace metrics and recent spaces/folders/lists when you have a workspaceId.

tools.name: workspace_hierarchy
tools.description: Fetch nested hierarchy (spaces, folders, lists) for one or more workspaces. Use this to browse structure without task data.

tools.name: hierarchy_resolve_path
tools.description: Resolve workspace/space/folder/list names into IDs. Use before tools that require IDs.

tools.name: member_list_for_workspace
tools.description: List members in a workspace by teamId. Use when you already know the workspaceId.

tools.name: member_resolve
tools.description: Resolve member identifiers (id, email, username) into member records for a workspace.

tools.name: member_search_by_name
tools.description: Fuzzy search member names to find member IDs.

tools.name: task_assignee_resolve
tools.description: Translate assignee references into suggested member IDs for tasks.

tools.name: space_tag_list
tools.description: List tags configured for a space using spaceId.

tools.name: space_tag_create
tools.description: Create a space tag by spaceId. Use space_tag_update to rename or recolor existing tags.

tools.name: space_tag_update
tools.description: Update a space tag name or color. Requires spaceId and currentName.

tools.name: space_tag_delete
tools.description: Delete a space tag from a space. Prefer dryRun first.

tools.name: folder_create_in_space
tools.description: Create a folder inside a space by spaceId or path.

tools.name: folder_update
tools.description: Update folder properties using folderId or path.

tools.name: folder_delete
tools.description: Delete a folder by folderId or path.

tools.name: list_create_for_container
tools.description: Create a list in a space or folder by ID or path.

tools.name: list_create_from_template
tools.description: Create a list from a template in a space or folder.

tools.name: list_update
tools.description: Update a list by listId or path.

tools.name: list_delete
tools.description: Delete a list by listId or path.

tools.name: list_view_create
tools.description: Create a view on a list by listId. Supports advanced filtering via 'filters' object.

tools.name: space_view_create
tools.description: Create a view at space level by spaceId. Supports advanced filtering via 'filters' object.

tools.name: view_update
tools.description: Update a view by viewId. Supports advanced filtering via 'filters' object.

tools.name: view_delete
tools.description: Delete a view by viewId.

tools.name: reference_link_list
tools.description: List public ClickUp API reference links.

tools.name: reference_page_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a public ClickUp API reference page from a link returned by reference_link_list.

tools.name: task_create
tools.description: Create a task in a list by listId.

tools.name: subtask_create
tools.description: Create a subtask in a list linked to parentTaskId.

tools.name: subtask_create_bulk
tools.description: Bulk create subtasks across one or many parents. Provide parentTaskId per entry or via defaults; each subtask is created with the parent field.

tools.name: task_create_bulk
tools.description: Bulk create tasks in lists using listId per task or defaults.

tools.name: task_update
tools.description: Update a task by taskId or lookup; description updates keep previous content appended.

tools.name: task_update_bulk
tools.description: Bulk update multiple tasks by taskIds; description updates keep previous content appended.

tools.name: task_delete
tools.description: Delete a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_delete_bulk
tools.description: Bulk delete tasks by taskIds.

tools.name: task_duplicate
tools.description: Duplicate a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_comment_add
tools.description: Post a comment on a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_attachment_add
tools.description: Attach a file to a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_tag_add
tools.description: Add tags to a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_tag_add_bulk
tools.description: Bulk add tags across multiple tasks by taskIds.

tools.name: task_tag_remove
tools.description: Remove tags from a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_search
tools.description: Structured task search with filters. Use when you have listIds/tagIds; returns tasks across lists.

tools.name: task_search_fuzzy
tools.description: Fuzzy task search from natural language when you do not have precise filters.

tools.name: task_search_fuzzy_bulk
tools.description: Batch fuzzy task searches for multiple natural language prompts.

tools.name: task_status_report
tools.description: Summarise task status and priority for a workspace, space, folder or list without returning full task lists.

tools.name: task_risk_report
tools.description: Summarise overdue and at-risk tasks within a workspace, space, folder or list. Subtasks are included by default; use includeSubtasks to focus on parent tasks and inspect isSubtask/parentId in results to understand hierarchy.

tools.name: task_read
tools.description: Fetch task details including createdDate/updatedDate fields derived from ClickUp timestamps. Subtask cues (isSubtask, parentId, hasSubtasks, subtaskCount) are included; check them before claiming there are no subtasks. GET /task/{task_id}

tools.name: task_list_for_list
tools.description: List tasks in a list. Tasks linked from other lists are included by default (include_timl=true). Outputs include createdDate derived from ClickUp date_created and hierarchy cues (isSubtask, parentId, hasSubtasks, subtaskCount). Always review hasSubtasks/subtaskCount before asserting there are no subtasks. Results are paginated and may span multiple pages; iterate via the page input to retrieve additional pages. GET /list/{list_id}/task

tools.name: task_comment_list
tools.description: Retrieve task comments for a taskId.

tools.name: list_custom_field_list
tools.description: List custom fields configured for a list by listId.

tools.name: task_custom_field_set_value
tools.description: Set a custom field value on a task by taskId and fieldId.

tools.name: task_custom_field_clear_value
tools.description: Clear a custom field value on a task by taskId and fieldId.

tools.name: doc_create
tools.description: Create a document in a folder by folderId.

tools.name: doc_list
tools.description: List documents within a workspace using filters.

tools.name: doc_read
tools.description: Fetch document metadata and pages for a docId.

tools.name: doc_pages_read
tools.description: Fetch selected document pages by docId and pageIds.

tools.name: doc_page_list
tools.description: List page hierarchy for a document by docId.

tools.name: doc_page_read
tools.description: Fetch a single document page by docId and pageId.

tools.name: doc_page_create
tools.description: Create a document page under a docId.

tools.name: doc_page_update
tools.description: Update a document page by docId and pageId.

tools.name: doc_search
tools.description: Search document content across a workspace. Use doc_page_read for specific pages.

tools.name: doc_search_bulk
tools.description: Batch document searches when you need several queries processed together.

tools.name: task_timer_start
tools.description: Start a timer on a task by taskId.

tools.name: task_timer_stop
tools.description: Stop the running timer for a task by taskId.

tools.name: time_entry_create_for_task
tools.description: Create a manual time entry for a task by taskId.

tools.name: time_entry_update
tools.description: Update a time entry by entryId.

tools.name: time_entry_delete
tools.description: Delete a time entry by entryId.

tools.name: task_time_entry_list
tools.description: Fetch time entries for a taskId, including total duration.

tools.name: time_entry_current
tools.description: Retrieve the current running timer for the workspace.

tools.name: time_entry_list
tools.description: List time entries with filters. Accepts ISO 8601 or epoch boundaries; include taskId when focusing on a single task.

tools.name: time_report_for_tag
tools.description: Aggregate logged time for a tag across the workspace. Use space_tag_list to discover tags, and includeSubtasks to control whether child task time is counted.

tools.name: time_report_for_container
tools.description: Aggregate time for a workspace, space, folder or list using containerId + containerType. Resolve IDs with resolve_path_to_ids, list_workspaces/spaces/folders/lists, and set includeSubtasks to clarify hierarchy handling.

tools.name: time_report_for_context
tools.description: Aggregate time for a task, list (including filtered views), space or workspace. Use search_tasks or task_list_for_list to source listId/taskId before calling. Subtask handling is explicit via includeSubtasks.

tools.name: time_report_for_space_tag
tools.description: Aggregate time for a tag within a space using spaceId. Use space_tag_list to pick the tag and includeSubtasks to control hierarchy.
